description: Composition Blue sweatshirt made of 100% cotton fleece, has a front zip opening, a hood with drawstrings, full raglan sleeves with adidas 3-Stripes in white tape running down both sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, seam covering tape on inner back neck, adidas print and contrast colour stitching on the chest and sleeves, brand tab on front hem, unfinished seam detail on hem and two pouch pockets on the front Fit Slim Wash care Wash below 40 degrees separately Do not dry clean Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Keep warm while you train with this hooded sweatshirt from Adidas. The 3-Stripes on the sleeves in bright white gives no doubt about your sportswear loyalty – stick to Adidas for superior performance from your Sports clothing. Easy opening with a zipped front makes this a great choice when the weather is changeable – wear it open or take it off when the sun comes out. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
